title: rubus questieri subsp. fagicola
intro: Rubus questieri subsp. fagicola, a lesser-known subspecies of the Rubus questieri plant, is a type of raspberry that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The leaves and stems of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, exhibiting antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties that can help protect against various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus questieri subsp. fagicola include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Rubus questieri subsp. fagicola include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, taken orally as supplements, or applied topically to the skin.
